description_long: This object is a modern grave site set on a rectangular stone platform with a paved stone base. The main feature is a two-tone upright headstone, with one half in polished black stone and the other in light gray marble, separated by a vertical seam. The black portion of the headstone features a cross and engraved inscriptions, while the gray portion is plain and textured. In front of the headstone lies a large, flat grave cover slab of matching gray marble. Three black cubic structures, likely serving as candle or flower holders, are positioned in a row on the paved area, each topped with a white spherical ornament. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with a strong contrast between the black and gray stone elements.
description: A modern grave site with a two-tone upright headstone, gray marble grave cover, and three black cubic holders with white spheres on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-tone headstone, the grave cover slab, and three black cubic holders with white spheres aligned on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the full length of the grave cover slab, with the cubic holders visible in the background.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the engraved black headstone with a cross, the gray marble slab, and the three black holders with white spheres on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the grave cover slab and the three black cubic holders with white spheres in the foreground.
